name: krambuhl
description: Agent-loop substrate: commons (foundation), loom (projects), griot (learnings), guild (panels), ev (loops), and the agent-loop-full meta-bundle.

plugins.name: commons
plugins.description: Foundation substrate: cross-cutting helpers (shared CLI lib + agent-conventions docs + interview/review skills) that the loom, guild, griot, and ev plugins all depend on. Cascades in via marketplace dependencies; consumers receive a synced local copy at install time.

plugins.name: griot
plugins.description: Learnings substrate: griot capture/use/compact CLI + griot-* skills + griot-* judge/rewriter/operator/rubric-author agents.

plugins.name: guild
plugins.description: Panel substrate: guild-validate / guild-whiteboard / guild-spawn skills + guild CLI + whiteboard-* / evaluator-* / generator-* agents.

plugins.name: loom
plugins.description: Project substrate: loom-* skills + loom CLI for plans, research, sessions, checkins, retros, archives.

plugins.name: linear-loom
plugins.description: Linear-backed project substrate: linear-loom CLI + linear-loom-* skills for plans, research, tasks, retros against a Linear workspace. Personal-CLI scope (no orchestration); composes guild for panel validation.

plugins.name: jelly-guild
plugins.description: Subagent registry for /goal-shaped projects under the jelly substrate family. Three-axis decomposition (personality HOW + domain WHAT + phase WHEN): 5 personality subagents read 5 domain + 4 phase mode files at dispatch time. Paired domain rubrics expose the same content to Outcomes-callable graders. Project-scoped CLAUDE.md template carries substrate posture via @-import composition.

plugins.name: jelly-loom
plugins.description: Record-keeping + plan-lifecycle layer of the jelly substrate family. Ships the jelly CLI (research, plan, revise, adr) + a hand-rolled TOML project manifest + a workspace-level ADR log + an MCP server exposing the verbs as mcp__jelly__* tools. Tighter metadata discipline than loom: single manifest.toml per project (write-once), no events.jsonl. Parallel to loom; both coexist.

plugins.name: ev
plugins.description: Execution loops: ev-loop-confidence (tiered transforms), ev-loop-interactive (paired units), ev-run (router).

plugins.name: ev-linear
plugins.description: Execution loops targeting linear-loom-backed projects: ev-loop-confidence (tiered transforms), ev-loop-interactive (paired units), ev-run (router). Parallel to ev; substrate references target linear-loom instead of loom (DESIGN.md § 17). Griot integration excised entirely (§ 18).

plugins.name: agent-loop-full
plugins.description: Meta-bundle: zero-content plugin that cascade-installs the full agent-loop family (commons, griot, guild, loom, ev).
